query: SELECT id, primaryDomain, status, totalAssets, totalFindings, overallRiskScore, discoveryCoverageScore FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain LIKE '%vianova%' OR primaryDomain LIKE '%aceofcloud%' OR primaryDomain LIKE '%databank%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
